mapping_metadata.analyzer: Senior Test Automation Mapping Specialist Agent

test_case_mappings.test_case_description: Test case to verify the Billing Cycle Period card display and behavior on Print and Payment History page when a subscription plan is paused, including verification of complimentary pages progress bar, additional pages tracking, tooltips, and page usage information display across different printing scenarios.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Enroll the Ink printer with 50 pages plan or higher.
precondition_mapping.notes: No printer enrollment methods found in this batch. The YAML files reference external setup file 'instantservices_login.yaml' but the actual enrollment logic is not present in these test case definition files. Enrollment methods likely exist in helper modules or API utility files in other batches.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Make sure the Subscription has no free months info.
precondition_mapping.notes: No subscription state verification methods found in this batch. The YAML files do not contain API helpers or verification methods for checking subscription free months status. Such methods likely exist in API helper modules in other batches.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Make sure the subscription is "subscribed" status.
precondition_mapping.notes: No subscription status verification methods found in this batch. The YAML files do not contain methods to check or set subscription status. Such methods likely exist in API helper or subscription management modules in other batches.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Click the Pause Plan button on CIT modal or "Pause Instant Ink" link to trigger the pause plan.
precondition_mapping.notes: No pause plan trigger methods found in this batch. While the YAML files contain various click actions, none specifically target a 'Pause Plan' button or 'Pause Instant Ink' link. The pause plan functionality likely exists in other test case files or page object modules in different batches.

step_level_mapping.step_action: Go to Print and Payment History page under HP Instant Ink.
step_level_mapping.step_expected_result: Print and Payment History page loads successfully

action_components_found_in_this_batch.notes: TC31266478 contains navigation to Print and Payment History page via click action on 'Print and Payment History' menu item. However, this is a YAML test case definition file, not a reusable page object or method. The actual navigation method implementation would need to be in a page object class or helper module, which is not present in this batch.

verification_components_found_in_this_ba.notes: TC31266478 contains a verification step (TC_print_and_payment_history_page_1) that validates the Print and Payment History page loaded with title, instant ink logo, and billing message. However, this is an AI-powered verification prompt in a YAML test definition, not a reusable assertion method. The actual verification method implementation would need to be in a page object or helper class, which is not present in this batch.

test_data_components_found_in_this_batch.notes: No test data constants or URL configurations found in this batch. The YAML files reference pages like 'instantink/Dashboard' but do not define the actual URL constants.

step_level_mapping.step_expected_result: Verify the plan pause information is not displayed.

The YAML verification prompt does not validate whether pause information is displayed or not. Detailed Billing Cycle Period card verification methods are not present in this batch.

test_case_mappings.partial_match_explanation: This batch contains YAML test case definition files for HP Instant Ink dashboard testing. While TC31266478 specifically tests the Print and Payment History page (which is the same page as test case C44873414), it only validates the page header and confirms the existence of the 'Billing Cycle Period' section at the bottom of the page. It does NOT contain the detailed verification logic for progress bars, tooltips, page usage values, or any of the specific Billing Cycle Period card components that C44873414 requires. The YAML files in this batch are test case definitions with AI-powered verification prompts, not reusable page objects, helper methods, or locator definitions. The actual implementation of page objects, locators, action methods, verification methods, and test data for the Billing Cycle Period card functionality would need to be in Python page object classes, helper modules, or configuration files, which are not present in this batch. The navigation pattern to Print and Payment History page exists in TC31266478, but it's embedded in a YAML test definition rather than being a reusable method. The batch also lacks all backend components needed for test case C44873414: no time manipulation methods, no print simulation API calls, no subscription state management, no printer enrollment methods, and no API helpers for any of the preconditions. Additionally, none of the device-specific interaction patterns (hover vs click based on device type), progress bar color verification, tooltip interaction methods, or responsive testing utilities required by C44873414 are present in this batch. The reference image comparison pattern demonstrated in TC31165188 for the 'Enroll or replace printer' modal shows the framework supports visual testing, but this specific pattern is not applied to the Billing Cycle Period card. In summary, this batch provides minimal relevance to test case C44873414 - it confirms the Print and Payment History page exists and has a Billing Cycle Period section, but contains none of the detailed component implementations needed to automate the test case.
